query: SELECT COUNT(*) as lojas_reais FROM lojas WHERE nome NOT LIKE '%test%' AND nome NOT LIKE '%Test%' AND nome NOT LIKE '%TEST%' AND nome NOT LIKE '%exemplo%' AND nome NOT LIKE '%demo%' AND nome NOT LIKE '%Batch%' AND nome NOT LIKE '%Import%' AND (email IS NULL OR (email NOT LIKE '%@test.com' AND email NOT LIKE '%@example.com'));
